title_en: The Milk Additive Banned Everywhere But the US
title_es: El Aditivo en la Leche Prohibido en Todo el Mundo Menos en EE.UU.
hook_en: Why is this milk additive banned worldwide?
hook_es: ¿Por qué este aditivo en la leche está prohibido en todo el mundo?
key_message: rBGH/rBST is banned in many countries due to health concerns, but still used in US dairy.
visual_elements: split-screen of milk cartons labeled 'USA' and 'Banned Countries'
graphic showing list of countries where rBGH/rBST is banned
animated graph showing increased cancer risk
_source_regulation_context:
ADDITIVES BANNED IN OTHER COUNTRIES BUT LEGAL IN US:
  • rBGH / rBST (Recombinant Bovine Growth Hormone): Dairy products (injected into cows to increase milk production) — Banned in: EU, Canada, Australia, Japan, Israel — Health concern: Increases IGF-1 levels in milk — linked to increased cancer risk

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_es: Epidemia de Obesidad: Cómo Contribuyó la Desregulación
hook_en: Did you know US obesity rates have tripled?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que las tasas de obesidad en EE.UU. se han triplicado?
key_message: Lack of strict food regulations contributes to rising obesity rates in the US.
visual_elements: timeline animation showing obesity rates from 1960 to 2024
side-by-side comparison of food labels with and without certain additives
highlighted text of US vs EU regulations
presenter pointing to the increasing obesity graph
